summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Dr. Sanchita's diagnostic centre website. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working perfectly with 100% success rate.
passed_tests: Contact form submission (POST /api/contact) works with MongoDB storage
Contact form validation properly handles invalid data (422 responses)
Get contacts endpoint (GET /api/contacts) retrieves stored data
Navbar navigation - all links scroll to correct sections smoothly
Mobile menu functionality - opens/closes correctly, navigation works
Hero section buttons (Book Appointment, View Facilities) work correctly
Facilities section displays all 3 facilities (Ultrasound, X-Ray, Consultancy)
About section shows all 4 statistics (Patients Served, Experience, Satisfaction, Support)
Location section displays all contact information correctly
Contact form frontend validation and backend integration
Contact form clears after successful submission
Mobile responsiveness - all sections work correctly on mobile
Images load properly on both desktop and mobile
Color scheme and design elements properly implemented
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (4/4 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all functionality working)
